# Equivalence Class 1
## Gram matrix Q
(64//1)^(1//7)  -(1//2)^(1//7)  (1//2)^(1//7)  (1//2)^(1//7)  -(1//2)^(1//7)  -(1//2)^(1//7)  (1//2)^(1//7)
-(1//2)^(1//7)  (64//1)^(1//7)  0  0  (1//2)^(1//7)  (1//2)^(1//7)  -(1//2)^(1//7)
(1//2)^(1//7)  0  (64//1)^(1//7)  (1//2)^(1//7)  -(1//2)^(1//7)  -(1//2)^(1//7)  (1//2)^(1//7)
(1//2)^(1//7)  0  (1//2)^(1//7)  (64//1)^(1//7)  -(1//2)^(1//7)  0  0
-(1//2)^(1//7)  (1//2)^(1//7)  -(1//2)^(1//7)  -(1//2)^(1//7)  1.8114461898603333  0.9057220320143297  -(1//2)^(1//7)
-(1//2)^(1//7)  (1//2)^(1//7)  -(1//2)^(1//7)  0  0.9057220320143297  1.8114457459774245  -0.9057226318807234
(1//2)^(1//7)  -(1//2)^(1//7)  (1//2)^(1//7)  0  -(1//2)^(1//7)  -0.9057226318807234  (64//1)^(1//7)

# Equivalence Class 2
## Gram matrix Q
1.6561362511659308  -(1//8)^(2//7)  -(1//8)^(2//7)  -(1//8)^(2//7)  (1//8)^(2//7)  -(1//8)^(2//7)  (1//8)^(2//7)

# Equivalence Class 3 is the same as EC 1
## Gram matrix Q
1.8114578823820755  0.9057116983341779  -0.9056850768329973  0.905728354156684  -0.9056962766077088  -0.9056619022320217  -0.9056779765575274
